_comment: Dependency manifest for the Horizon portfolio system. Machine-readable companion to ARCHITECTURE.md. Keep in sync — same commit rule applies. Format: version 0.1.0.

dashboard_ui.notes: Read-only consumer of API. Any API response shape change breaks rendering.

api_portfolio_summary.notes: Populates cache on miss. Cache TTL must not exceed 300s per INV-07.

api_post_orders.notes: Idempotency key checked against db:orders before insert. Redis stream orders:pending consumed by broker_worker.

calculate_nav.notes: Pure function — no side effects. All arithmetic must be Decimal (INV-08). Returns NAVResult, does not write anywhere.

snapshot_nav.notes: Append-only insert to nav_snapshots. Post-condition asserts INV-01 before insert. Sets Redis TTL=60s.

apply_fill.notes: UPSERT on positions. DEL nav:* on every successful write (INV-07). Enforces INV-02, INV-04, INV-08. Never called directly by API.

reconcile_positions.notes: Positions corrections are the only legitimate non-apply_fill write to positions. All corrections logged to reconcile_log. Append-only on reconcile_log (INV-06).

broker_worker.notes: Fill handler validates FK (INV-03), normalises commission sign (INV-05), calls apply_fill. Order submission updates orders.status and ibkr_order_id.

scheduler.notes: Calls POST /internal/snapshot every 5 min, POST /internal/reconcile every 15 min. Does not write DB directly — delegates to snapshot_nav and reconcile_positions via HTTP.

INV-01.description: NAV components must sum: total_nav == cash + sum(positions.market_value) within epsilon
INV-01.on_violation: raise InconsistentNAVError — snapshot is NOT inserted

INV-02.description: positions.quantity must never be zero; zero-quantity rows must be deleted
INV-02.formula: quantity != 0 for all rows in positions
INV-02.on_violation: raise ZeroPositionError; DB CHECK blocks write

INV-03.description: Every fills row must reference a valid orders.id (no orphan fills)
INV-03.enforced_in: DB FK constraint + broker_worker pre-insert validation
INV-03.on_violation: FK violation = DB rejects insert; worker routes to DEAD_LETTER queue

INV-04.description: Aggregated fill quantity per order must not exceed order quantity (no overfill)
INV-04.formula: SUM(fills.quantity WHERE order_id=X) <= orders.quantity WHERE id=X
INV-04.on_violation: raise OverfillError — fill is rejected and logged, not applied

INV-05.description: fills.commission must be >= 0 after normalisation (broker may return negative)
INV-05.on_violation: raise FillValidationError if negative after abs()

INV-06.description: nav_snapshots, reconcile_log, audit_log, fills are append-only — no UPDATE or DELETE
INV-06.formula: no UPDATE/DELETE DML on these tables from any application code path
INV-06.enforced_in: DB triggers (raise exception on UPDATE/DELETE) + migration guard rules
INV-06.on_violation: DB trigger raises exception; CI migration guard blocks the migration PR

INV-07.description: Redis nav:summary TTL must not exceed 300s; must be invalidated on any position write
INV-07.formula: TTL(nav:summary) <= 300 AND DEL(nav:*) called by apply_fill before returning
INV-07.on_violation: Stale NAV alert raised by reconcile_positions on next run; TTL violation logged

INV-08.description: All monetary arithmetic uses Decimal with ROUND_HALF_EVEN; float is forbidden in financial paths
INV-08.formula: type(value) == Decimal for all quantity, price, nav, pnl, commission values
INV-08.enforced_in: apply_fill() type guard, calculate_nav() type guard, Pydantic models with Decimal fields
INV-08.on_violation: raise TypeError(f'Expected Decimal, got {type(v)}') — fail loud, not silent

block_if_alter_append_only.description: Block any migration that adds UPDATE or DELETE capability to append-only tables
block_if_alter_append_only.check: grep -E '(UPDATE|DELETE)' migration_file AND table IN append_only_tables
block_if_alter_append_only.action: CI fails with explicit message listing the violated table and INV-06

block_if_patch_forbidden_column.description: Block any migration or data script that directly writes to derived/computed columns
block_if_patch_forbidden_column.action: CI fails with message: 'Derived column patch forbidden — use owning function instead'
